name: edusync-platform
description: Multi-portal student management platform with a TypeScript API, admin console, and principal portal.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend-ts" "npm run dev --prefix frontend-admin"
scripts.dev:full: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend-ts" "npm run dev --prefix frontend-admin" "npm run dev --prefix frontend-principal"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend-ts && npm run build --prefix frontend-admin && npm run build --prefix frontend-principal
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix frontend-admin && npm run lint --prefix frontend-principal
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run build
